backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the fabric supplier backend with product management, customer inquiry submission, user profiles, and admin-only access control via a MixinAuthorization mixin.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining old and new actor state shapes for fabric products and customer inquiries, with a `run` function that passes state through unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the admin dashboard authorization feature (access denied for non-owners) to its relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference for the project's frontend structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining light/dark CSS custom properties for the shadcn-ui design token system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'PRODAL TEX - Premium Fabric Supplier' and mounts the React app via the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with routes for Home, Products, Product Detail, Contact, and Admin Dashboard, all wrapped in the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the PRODAL TEX brand, quick navigation links, and real business contact details (email, phone, Surat address) with clickable mailto/tel links.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with logo, navigation links (including Admin for authenticated users), and Internet Identity login/logout controls for both desktop and mobile layouts.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout wrapper that renders the Header and Footer around a TanStack Router Outlet for all child pages.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a fabric product card with image, badge, specs (GSM, width), color, price, and a link to the product detail page.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching products, fetching inquiries, submitting inquiries, and initializing sample products via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the Prodal Tex brand color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that displays customer inquiries in a table, with login/unauthorized screens gating access via Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact and inquiry form page that validates and submits customer inquiries to the backend, with optional product pre-selection via URL search params.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for PRODAL TEX featuring a hero banner, selling points section, and a featured products grid that auto-initializes sample products if none exist.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Product detail page that fetches a single product by ID and displays its image, specs (weight, width, price, etc.), description, and a breadcrumb navigation.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Products listing page with a color filter dropdown that fetches all products and renders them in a responsive grid with loading and error states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom brand color tokens (charcoal, offwhite, teal), typography/container-query plugins, and extended font families for the project.
project_state.json: Tracks the state of the 'Prodal Tex' e-commerce project including schema version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of existing features with their IDs and requirements.
